channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Sean 'Diddy' Combs hit with new sex trafficking charges a month before trial
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Federal prosecutors have added two charges to Sean “Diddy” Combs ' indictment, expanding on allegations that the jailed hip-hop mogul engaged in sex trafficking as recently as last year.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. SISAK, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: FDA approves at-home chlamydia, gonorrhea, trichomoniasis test for women
item.description: Visby Medical Women’s Sexual Health Test can be taken by those with or without symptoms,and delivers results in about 30 minutes.
item.dc:creator: Cassie Buchman, NewsNation

item.title: Trump calls for Marine Le Pen to be freed
item.description: President Donald Trump on Thursday defended embattled French far-right leader Marine Le Pen, arguing the “witch hunt” against her is yet another instance of critics in Europe using “lawfare” to quash free speech and censor political opposition.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, KRON4

item.title: 3 alleged MS-13 gang members in Florida hit with federal murder charges
item.description: Three alleged MS-13 gang members or associates have been charged with murder in connection to a 2015 killing, U.S. Attorney General Pam Bondi announced Friday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: US added 228,000 jobs in March as economy showed strength in buildup to Trump trade wars
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — U.S. employers added a surprising 228,000 jobs last month, showing that the American labor market was in solid shape as President Donald Trump embarked on a risky trade war with the rest of the world. The unemployment rate ticked up to 4.2%.
item.dc:creator: PAUL WISEMAN and ANNE D'INNOCENZIO, Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: RealPage sues California city officials over rental algorithm ban
item.description: Real estate software company RealPage filed a federal lawsuit Wednesday against Berkeley, California — the latest city to try to block landlords from using algorithms when deciding rents. Officials in many cities claim the practice is anti-competitive and is driving up the price of housing.
item.dc:creator: R.J. RICO, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: The death toll in the North Macedonia nightclub fire rises to 60 after a burn victim dies
item.description: SKOPJE, North Macedonia (AP) — A critically injured burn victim from a nightclub fire last month in North Macedonia has died while receiving treatment in Lithuania, raising the death toll to 60, the country’s health minister said Friday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: How Trump's latest tariffs could affect your wallet
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — President Donald Trump has unveiled his latest tariffs, and they could have significant implications for your wallet. Trump's sweeping new tariffs, on top of previous levies and retaliation worldwide, are expected to increase prices for everyday items.
item.dc:creator: WYATTE GRANTHAM-PHILIPS and CORA LEWIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: What to know about the severe storms and flash flooding hitting parts of the US
item.description: LITTLE ROCK, Ark. (AP) — At least seven people have been killed in a wide swath of violent storms and tornadoes that hit the South and Midwest, and officials are bracing for more severe weather and flooding in the coming days.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DeMILLO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: HHS staff working on childhood lead exposure and cancer clusters fired
item.description: Staff members who fought childhood lead exposure and those who worked on cancer clusters were among those who were fired from the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS), a now former employee told The Hill.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Frazin, ABC 4

item.title: Sell-off worsens worldwide after China retaliates against Trump tariffs
item.description: Stock markets worldwide are careening even lower after China matched President Donald Trump’s big raise in tariffs in an escalating trade war.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump ordered to pay legal fees in ‘Steele Dossier’ lawsuit
item.description: A judge in the United Kingdom has ordered President Donald Trump to pay more than $820,000 in legal fees to the company representing former British spy Christopher Steele after he unsuccessfully sued over a dossier.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, ABC 4

item.title: Federal officials are quietly terminating the legal residency of some international college students
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A crackdown on foreign students is alarming colleges, who say the Trump administration is using new tactics and vague justifications to push some students out of the country. College officials worry the new approach will keep foreigners from wanting to study in the U.S.
item.dc:creator: COLLIN BINKLEY, ANNIE MA and MAKIYA SEMINERA, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Trump administration issues demands on Harvard as conditions for billions in federal money
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Trump administration has issued a list of demands Harvard University must meet as a condition for receiving almost $9 billion in grants and contracts, federal money that is being threatened during an investigation into campus antisemitism.
item.dc:creator: COLLIN BINKLEY, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Comedian Russell Brand charged with rape and sexual assault in UK
item.description: British police on Friday charged Russell Brand with rape and sexual assault following an 18-month investigation sparked when four women alleged they had been assaulted by the controversial comedian.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Invited to the Met Gala, nothing to wear? Hint: Find yourself a 'superfine' suit
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — What’s in a suit? According to curators busy prepping the newest Met Gala exhibit, a whole lot more than tailoring: history, culture, identity, power and, most of all, self-expression.
item.dc:creator: JOCELYN NOVECK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ford offering employee pricing to all shoppers in wake of Trump tariffs
item.description: The campaign comes as Trump has rolled out a fresh package of tariffs, impacting nearly every country in the world.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, Fox 5

item.title: Tesla's first-quarter sales down 13% worldwide
item.description: Tesla deliveries plunged 13 percent worldwide during the first quarter of this year, according to reports in Reuters and the Wall Street Journal.
item.dc:creator: Salvador Rivera, Fox 5

item.title: Trump sued over China tariffs
item.description: It marks the first known legal challenge against Trump’s tariffs, which have fulfilled a campaign promise and rattled financial markets.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, Fox 5

item.title: China to impose a 34% tariff on imports of all US products
item.description: BEIJING (AP) — China announced Friday that it will impose a 34% tariff on imports of all U.S. products beginning April 10, part of a flurry of retaliatory measures following U.S. President Donald Trump’s “Liberation Day” slate of double-digit tariffs. The new tariff matches the rate of the U.S.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: US electric vehicle industry is collateral damage in Trump's escalating trade war
item.description: One big loser in President Donald Trump’s escalating trade war is likely to be the U.S. electric vehicle industry.
item.dc:creator: Alexa St. John, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: What you do before and during a tornado could save your life
item.description: When a tornado takes aim at your house, and the sirens are sounding, the dogs are barking and the children are screaming, there are some last-minute precautions that could save the lives of you and your loved ones.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Five big questions the GOP's budget plan for Trump leaves unanswered
item.description: Senate Republicans are pushing to adopt a budget blueprint this week to kick off a complex process to advance President Trump’s tax agenda.
item.dc:creator: Aris Folley, Fox 5

item.title: Criminal drug ring nabbed, gangbanger killed near popular Cancún resort frequented by American tourists
item.description: An alleged gang member of a criminal drug ring was killed at a resort in Cancún frequented by American tourists following an altercation during an undercover operation at the hotel.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: South and Midwest face potentially catastrophic rains and floods while reeling from tornadoes
item.description: Parts of the Midwest and South are facing the possibility torrential rains and life-threatening flash floods.
item.dc:creator: Adrian Sainz, George Walker Iv And John Seewer, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Unemployment benefits for striking workers being considered in Oregon, Washington
item.description: SEATTLE (AP) — Lawmakers in Oregon and Washington are considering whether striking workers should receive unemployment benefits, following recent walkouts by Boeing factory workers, hospital nurses and teachers in the Pacific Northwest that highlighted a new era of American labor activism.
item.dc:creator: MARTHA BELLISLE and CLAIRE RUSH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Transgender student's arrest for violating Florida bathroom law is thought to be a first
item.description: A transgender college student declared “I am here to break the law” before entering a women’s restroom at the Florida State Capitol and being led out in handcuffs by police.
item.dc:creator: HANNAH SCHOENBAUM, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Remains of Illinois woman who disappeared in 1983 found after cold case investigators start podcast
item.description: Karen Schepers' remains were finally identified after being found in a car submerged in the Fox River, nearly 43 years after she went missing.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, Fox 5

item.title: Trump's reciprocal tariffs a 'double-edged sword': Sen. Ron Johnson
item.description: Trump promised the tariffs will bring about "the golden age of America," but economists have warned a recession could happen.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Perkins, NewsNation

item.title: Natchitoches, Louisiana student wins first place in national competition
item.description: Brandon Jordan, a student from Northwestern State University, had to troubleshoot a virtual computer for the competition.
item.dc:creator: Dominique Woods, NewsNation

item.title: Trump: Tariff rollout 'going very well,' says markets will 'boom' amid slump
item.description: President Trump on Thursday insisted that the rollout of his new reciprocal tariffs is "going really well" despite markets taking a plunge and foreign leaders appearing rattled by the prospect of a global recession.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, KRON4

item.title: What you do before and during a tornado could mean the difference between life and death
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — With new innovations and technology, scientists have learned from major tornado outbreaks over the years how to improve safety guidance. During tornado season, forecasters try to get the word out about staying safe during a storm — but also planning for it ahead of time.
item.dc:creator: JEFF MARTIN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: A lawsuit by inmates is challenging Tennessee's plans to resume executions. Here's how
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Nine Tennessee death row inmates are suing the state over its push for a new round of lethal injections after an execution was abruptly called off in 2022 and a follow-up investigation found scores of missteps in several executions.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN MATTISE, Associated Press, ABC 4
